alkylation reagent: alkylated (5 mM iodoacetamide, 20 min, room temperature in the dark)
alkylation concentration: alkylated (5 mM iodoacetamide, 20 min, room temperature in the dark)
cleavage agent: enzyme specificity of trypsin with up to two missed cleavages
enrichment method: 100 µL anti-FLAG Sepharose 4B beads (Biomaker, Houston, USA, catalog #23102)
fragmentation method: up to 12 most abundant precursor ions were selected MS2 in a data-dependent manner (HCD, R = 15,000)
instrument: were analysed on a Q-Exactive HF-X mass spectrometer
labeling: peptides were subjected to high-pH reverse phase fractionation.
